persona.name: Neha Rao
persona.role_summary: Principal AI Systems Architect — Java microservices architecture, AI platform integration, distributed system design, and technical architecture leadership.

allocation_rationale: Neha leads AI platform and distributed systems design. Architect-review and backend-architect anchor her technical leadership role. AI/ML skills support platform integration; java-pro covers implementation; context-manager and prompt-engineer align with AI platform work; legacy-modernizer supports enterprise migration contexts.

skills.name: backend-architect
skills.description: Design scalable backend systems with microservices, event-driven architecture, and modern cloud patterns. Masters distributed systems and database optimization. Use PROACTIVELY for backend system design.

skills.name: architect-review
skills.description: Provide detailed design review feedback on architecture diagrams and technical specifications. Evaluates scalability, security, and best practices. Use PROACTIVELY for architecture reviews.

skills.name: java-pro
skills.description: Write enterprise Java with Spring Boot, modern JDK features, and reactive programming. Masters JVM optimization and microservices. Use PROACTIVELY for Java development.

skills.name: python-pro
skills.description: Write Pythonic code with modern patterns, type hints, and performance optimization. Masters async programming and popular frameworks. Use PROACTIVELY for Python development.

skills.name: ai-engineer
skills.description: Build production ML systems with MLOps pipelines, model optimization, and responsible AI practices. Masters PyTorch, TensorFlow, and modern LLM integration patterns. Use PROACTIVELY for ML system design or AI integration.

skills.name: ml-engineer
skills.description: Build and deploy production ML systems with model training, optimization, and serving. Masters MLOps workflows and feature engineering. Use PROACTIVELY for ML engineering.

skills.name: prompt-engineer
skills.description: Design effective prompts for LLMs with clear instructions, examples, and guardrails. Masters chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, and prompt optimization. Use PROACTIVELY for prompt engineering.

skills.name: context-manager
skills.description: Manage AI conversation context, memory systems, and retrieval-augmented generation. Optimizes token usage and maintains conversation coherence. Use PROACTIVELY for AI context optimization.

skills.name: graphql-architect
skills.description: Design efficient GraphQL APIs with schema design, resolvers, and performance optimization. Masters federation and real-time subscriptions. Use PROACTIVELY for GraphQL architecture.

skills.name: database-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize database performance with query tuning, indexing strategies, and execution plan analysis. Masters multiple database engines. Use PROACTIVELY for database optimization.

skills.name: mermaid-expert
skills.description: Create clear diagrams using Mermaid syntax for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, and architecture visualizations. Use PROACTIVELY for diagram creation.

skills.name: performance-engineer
skills.description: Optimize application performance with profiling, benchmarking, and capacity planning. Masters load testing and bottleneck analysis. Use PROACTIVELY for performance optimization.

skills.name: security-auditor
skills.description: Conduct security audits with vulnerability assessment, penetration testing guidance, and compliance review. Masters OWASP and security frameworks. Use PROACTIVELY for security audits.

skills.name: docs-architect
skills.description: Design comprehensive documentation systems with information architecture, style guides, and content strategy. Masters technical writing and docs-as-code workflows. Use PROACTIVELY for documentation projects.

skills.name: legacy-modernizer
skills.description: Modernize legacy systems with incremental refactoring, strangler fig pattern, and technology migration. Handles risk assessment and team enablement. Use PROACTIVELY for legacy modernization.
